Start here · no account · no wallet

Understand the system
in one proof path.

This guided route turns the project into a simple experience: learn the contract identity, run a browser-local proof cycle, export a docket, then stop at human review.

Run the first demoCreate a local proof packRun Coordination Lab

Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, wallet, seed, or private-key information. The demos are local-only and produce public-safe examples.

60-second tour

From contract to proof institution.

01

Demo Lab

Choose a preset mission and watch the lifecycle gates advance automatically, then export the public-safe docket.

02

Mission Studio

Write a plain-language objective and generate a local GoalOS proof pack for review.

03

Proof Cards

Copy clear explanations and launch snippets for non-technical stakeholders.

04

Coordination Lab

Compare swarm, fixed crew, and proof-governed institution modes with autonomous local proof gates.

05

Proof Gradient Arena

See the Selection Gate: score is advisory, gates are mandatory, and proof decides what can propagate.

06

Chronicle Compounding Lab

Watch accepted proof become reusable capability and rejected work become a warning instead of authority.

07

Ascension Inflow Control

Tune compute, data, tasks, incentives, feedback, governance, and tools to find the proof-sustaining regime.

Core Loop

Proof-to-Action Theatre

Run the cleanest public demonstration of GoalOS: objective to proof to governed decision state.

© MontrealAI · browser-local public-safe demos · no wallet · no network · no user data wanted · Privacy · Terms · AGIALPHA Boundary
